ddls:
CREATE TABLE "water_points" (
  "water_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water point */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "basin" TEXT /* Name of the basin where the water point is located */,
  "region_code" INTEGER /* Code of the region where the water point is located */,
  "extraction_type" TEXT /* Type of extraction method used */,
  "extraction_type_class" TEXT /* Class of extraction type */,
  "management" TEXT /* Management method of the water point */,
  "payment" TEXT /* Payment method for water usage */,
  "water_quality" TEXT /* Water quality */,
  "quality_group" TEXT /* Quality group (e.g., good, poor) */,
  "quantity" TEXT /* Quantity of water available */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the water */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of water source */,
  "source_class" TEXT /* Class of water source */,
  "waterpoint_type" TEXT /* Type of water point */,
  "status_group" TEXT /* Status of the water point (e.g., functional, non-functional) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the water point's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the water point's location */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the water point was installed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who last inspected the water point */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the water point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("water_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_points_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspector ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_points_region_code FOREIGN KEY ("region_code") REFERENCES regions ("region_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "basin" TEXT /* Name of the basin where the region is located */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Description of the region's location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the region's data was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_quality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each water quality metric */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., pH, turbidity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum acceptable value for the metric */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum acceptable value for the metric */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric data was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "water_point_metrics" (
  "metric_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "water_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the water point the measurement belongs to */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the water quality metric being measured */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who took the measurement */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to take the measurement */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_point_metrics_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspector ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_point_metrics_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES water_quality_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_water_point_metrics_water_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("water_point_id") REFERENCES water_points ("water_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry clerk, field technician, admin) */,
  "region_code" INTEGER /* Region code the user is associated with */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing user permissions */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_region_code FOREIGN KEY ("region_code") REFERENCES regions ("region_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "water_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the water point inspected */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Notes from the inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the water point after the inspection (e.g., functional, non-functional, requires repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_water_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("water_point_id") REFERENCES water_points ("water_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspector ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspector" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the inspector */,
  "region_code" INTEGER /* Region code the inspector is associated with */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inspector (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspector_region_code FOREIGN KEY ("region_code") REFERENCES regions ("region_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Date and time the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Date and time the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
